Roles and responsibilities

All staff: 
General knowledge sharing 
Hosting meetings - IT, Cyclops, Clinical team meeting
Onboarding 
Making sure that information is documented and distributed to the lab 
Identify points of improvement 
Identify things that are not working optimally
Bring into discussions, make action plans
General lab atmosphere
Asking ppl how they are doing
Refer to help from eg. Anniina, HR etc.
